framework_basis: CARE Principles for Indigenous Data Governance

INTERNAL_BENCHMARK.rationale: Federated peer benchmarks across CAHs in the cohort; differential-privacy aggregates only, never raw records.

TRIBAL_COUNCIL.rationale: On-jurisdiction reporting to the tribal health authority. Plain-text aggregates permitted; PHI still redacted.

STATE_DOH.rationale: State Department of Health (Arizona). Requires tribal council co-signature key tc-2026-q2.

CMS.rationale: Federal reporting. Allowed in DP-aggregated form only; tribal council co-signature key tc-2026-q2 required for the reporting period.

notes: This is a sample policy file. In production, a tribal council updates this through their own governance process and ships it to the box on a USB key. The application enforces it; the application does not author it.
